headline: AT&T Stock Drops After Downgrade. Blame SpaceX.
summary: Such concerns led Oppenheimer analyst Timothy Horan to downgrade shares of  AT&T  to Perform from Outperform on Wednesday and removed his previous price target of $32.  Rising competition from providers of satellite broadband, like  Amazon  Leo and SpaceX’s Starlink, could take market share from AT&T’s internet business.  SpaceX  is expected to go public next week, and Horan says the IPO will highlight the risks satellite poses to AT&T.
